title: Pongo! Paddle Pals!
description:
Pong... But it's a roguelite!

Choose your paddle persona and battle devious enemy paddles as you work you fight your way through the arcade circuit board to finally defeat the all knowing, all powerful, Master Paddle.

Each of the 10 unlockable Paddles comes with a unique, look, personality and play style to master completely different, with 10 hand crafted classes, each with their own unique and approachable playstyle.

Three acts (for now…), each one with bosses harder than the previous act. From rabbits to dragons, from bats to cumulonimbuses, every boss offers a new challenge for you to overcome.

Explore the circuit board of an arcade cabinet that you have been sucked into where the only way out is to PONG! IT! UP!

Key Features:

• 10 unique classes with their own active abilities and starting kits

• 30+ relics across Common, Uncommon, Rare, and Boss tiers

• Procedurally generated circuit-board maps

• 10+ boss fights with unique paddle mechanics

• Floor modifiers that warp ball physics mid-fight 

• Minigames hiding behind mystery doors

• A possible hidden mystery boss lurking behind the scenes the whole time…
description_short: Pong... But it's a roguelite! Pick a class, pick a ball blessing, then paddle your way through three acts of devious enemy paddles. Stack relics, find synergies, survive floor modifiers warping the ball mid-rally. PONG! IT! UP!
